extensionDescription.message: Have control over WebRTC (disable | enable) and protect your IP address.

optionsBlockSupportDetectionNote.message: Note: when this option is marked, "RTCPeerConnection", "MediaStreamTrack" and "RTCSessionDescription" are blocked.

optionsBlockMediaDevicesNote.message: Note: when this option is marked, all video and audio devices are blocked (not active by default).

optionsBlockAdditionalObjectsNote.message: Note: when this option is marked, "RTCIceCandidate", "RTCDataChannel" and "RTCConfiguration" are blocked (not active by default).

optionsIpHandlingPolicyNote.message: Note: default option is - Disable non proxied UDP

optionsDisabledSites.message: Sites where WebRTC Control is disabled

blacklistInputPlaceholder.message: example.com, *.example.com, or one site per line

optionsDisabledSitesNote.message: Note: matching sites do not receive page scripts, and the browser WebRTC policy is set to default while the matching tab is active.

statusEntriesLimit.message: Please use 5000 or fewer entries at a time.

statusImportFileTooLarge.message: Import failed. Please choose a file smaller than 1 MB.

statusImportFailed.message: Import failed. Please choose a valid JSON or TXT blacklist file.

statusSummary.message: $1 $2 sites. Skipped $3 duplicates and $4 invalid entries.

actionTitleOffOnSite.message: WebRTC leak protection is OFF on this site
